title: MGN 657 (M+F) Amendment 1 requirements for fixed aerosol fire extinguishing systems for use in small vessel machinery spaces
body: "Further context, include target audience information from beginning notice:  Notice to all Shipowners, Ship Operators, Masters and Officers of Ships, Ship Designers, and Shipbuilders of Fishing Vessels Under 24m, Small Commercial Codes Vessels, Domestic Passenger Vessels of class III to VI(A), Surveyors, and Providers of Aerosol Fire Suppression Systems. "
